description.infoAlert: Describe your project in detail. The more specific you are, the more accurate the AI estimate will be.
description.textPlaceholder:
Describe your project in detail. Include:

• What work needs to be done
• Specific materials desired
• Any special requirements
• Timeline preferences
• Budget constraints (if any)

textTips.beSpecific: Be specific about materials (e.g., 'granite countertops' vs 'countertops')
textTips.includeSize: Include room sizes or square footage when possible
textTips.noteConstraints: Note any timeline or budget constraints
textTips.title: 💡 Tips for Better Estimates

description.voiceInputAdded: Voice input has been added to your description. Switch to the Text tab to review and edit.
